title: Senior Software Engineer - Atos India - Experienced Professionals

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - Atos India - Experienced Professionals
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Atos India. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Senior Software Engineer to strengthen our Mumbai-based team.

About Atos India:
Atos India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in SQL

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Atos India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
